roadmap.title: Begin the story
roadmap.description: Complete Day 1 normally and learn the tower, map, compass, and radio interactions used throughout the route.

roadmap.title: Handle the Day 2 optional finds
roadmap.description: After repairing the power line, collect and empty the disposable camera near Cache 241, adopt the Aspen Grove turtle, then finish Day 2.

roadmap.title: Clear the late-story detours
roadmap.description: Complete Day 76 for the fire axe. On Day 77, collect the Ol' Shoshone cassette, trigger the Hawk's Rest raccoon, open the WAPITI bee box, and then finish the day.

roadmap.title: Finish the story and clean up
roadmap.description: Complete Day 79. If needed, use Special Features > Free Roam for the turtle, raccoon, or cassette; Bee Plot requires a Day 77 save or a new story run.

achievements.summary: Complete the opening story objectives and finish @mechanic{Day 1}.

guide.context: This is an automatic story milestone. Dialogue choices and the optional activities encountered during the day do not prevent it.

steps.text: Follow Delilah's objectives throughout @mechanic{Day 1} until the game advances to the next day; the achievement unlocks during that transition.

achievements.summary: Complete the required story objectives and finish @mechanic{Day 2}.

guide.context: This automatic milestone cannot be missed. Collect the disposable camera and adopt a turtle before ending the day if you want both nearby optional achievements during the story route.

steps.text: Continue Delilah's required objectives through @mechanic{Day 2} until the game advances to the next day; the achievement unlocks during the transition.

achievements.summary: Complete the required story objectives and finish @mechanic{Day 76}.

guide.context: This is an automatic story milestone. The fire axe acquired along this portion of the story is also required for the Day 77 cassette, raccoon, and bee detours.

steps.text: Follow the main objectives throughout @mechanic{Day 76} until the game advances to Day 77; the achievement unlocks automatically.

achievements.summary: Complete the required story objectives and finish @mechanic{Day 77}.

guide.context: This automatic story milestone cannot be missed. Finish the Ol' Shoshone cassette, raccoon, and Wapiti bee detours before advancing, because the bee encounter cannot be recovered in Free Roam.

steps.text: Complete the investigation and all remaining required objectives on @mechanic{Day 77} until the story advances; the achievement unlocks automatically.

achievements.description: Complete Day 79 and finish the story.
achievements.summary: Finish the main story by completing the evacuation sequence on @mechanic{Day 79}.

guide.context: This final story achievement is automatic and is not blocked by dialogue choices. Completing the ending also unlocks Free Roam under Special Features for eligible optional-achievement cleanup.

steps.text: Follow the final objectives on @mechanic{Day 79}, reach the evacuation point, and complete the ending sequence to unlock the achievement.

achievements.description: Got stung by a bee. It happens.
achievements.summary: On @mechanic{Day 77}, open the small @item{WAPITI box} beside the newly breached @loc{Wapiti Meadow} gate and let the bee sting Henry.

guide.context: This interaction is available only during the Day 77 break-in objective and does not exist in Free Roam. Make a manual save before breaching the gate so a missed or failed trigger can be retried without replaying the game.

steps.text: After receiving the replacement radio on @mechanic{Day 77}, follow the objective route past @loc{Medicine Wheel} and @loc{Cripple Gulch} to the locked @loc{Wapiti Meadow} gate.
Report the gate to Delilah, then use the @item{fire axe} to pry it open.
Immediately inside the entrance, open the small @item{WAPITI box} mounted beside the gate; the bee sting unlocks the achievement.

achievements.displayName: The Life and Times of Raccoon Carter
achievements.description: Got attacked by a raccoon; probably didn't get rabies.
achievements.summary: Enter the basement of the ruined @loc{Hawk's Rest} cabin near @loc{Beartooth Point}, open the stove, and let the raccoon attack Henry.

guide.context: The encounter is available during the late-story route and in Free Roam. Its trigger can register late, so save outside the cabin and reload that save if opening the stove does not produce the achievement.

steps.text: Travel north toward @loc{Beartooth Point}; near the trail divisions between @loc{Thorofare Trail} and the Telephone map label, locate the ruined outhouse.
Walk east from the outhouse to the ruined @loc{Hawk's Rest} cabin and descend into its basement.
Open the stove and let the emerging raccoon attack Henry, then remain in the basement until the achievement registers.

achievements.description: Filled a disposable camera with photos.
achievements.summary: On @mechanic{Day 2}, collect the disposable camera from the backpack near @loc{Cache 241}, then take photographs until its film is exhausted.

guide.context: The backpack becomes accessible after the power-line objective. The unlock requires using every remaining exposure, so save before collecting the camera and retry from that save if Steam does not register the final photograph.

steps.text: After repairing the downed power line on @mechanic{Day 2}, follow the trail toward @loc{Cache 241} and cross the log bridge at the fork.
Find the backpack hanging from a tree, knock it down, and collect the @item{disposable camera} from its contents.
Equip the camera and take photographs until no film remains; the achievement unlocks after the last available exposure is used.

achievements.description: Adopted a turtle as a pet. The average lifespan of a box turtle is fifty years. It will outlive you.
achievements.summary: Find a turtle near @loc{Aspen Grove} on @mechanic{Day 2}, pick it up, and hold the @mechanic{Keep} prompt.

guide.context: Turtle spawns vary, and merely examining one is insufficient. If the Aspen Grove turtle is absent, reload the area or use Free Roam after finishing the story to search the known turtle locations.

steps.text: On @mechanic{Day 2}, update the map at @loc{Cache 309}, then travel west into @loc{Aspen Grove}.
Face north and inspect the boulder between two tall pine trees for a turtle; reload the area if it did not spawn.
Pick up the turtle and hold the @mechanic{Keep} command so it enters Henry's inventory; retaining the turtle unlocks the achievement.

achievements.description: Listened to the tape of "Ol' Shoshone." Cavorted among the aspens.
achievements.summary: On @mechanic{Day 77}, use the fire axe to reach the hidden campsite off the route to @loc{Beartooth Point}, then collect and keep the @item{Ol' Shoshone cassette}.

guide.context: The cassette requires the fire axe obtained during Day 76. Day 79 no longer offers the keep action, but the achievement can be recovered in Free Roam after completing the story by taking the axe from the tower first.

steps.text: On @mechanic{Day 77}, leave the tower heading north toward @loc{Beartooth Point} while carrying the @item{fire axe}.
At the first trail split, take the left western branch, push through the bushes, and chop through the wooden obstruction with the axe.

Enter the campsite beyond the blockage, pick up the @item{Ol' Shoshone cassette}, and hold the @mechanic{Keep} command; retaining the cassette unlocks the achievement, while examining it alone does not.
